flags.label: Undergraduate enrollment
flags.summary: Undergraduate enrollment at Beaufort County Community College fell 23% between 2021 and 2024 (1.4k → 1.1k).

flags.label: Median federal debt at exit
flags.summary: Median federal debt at exit at Beaufort County Community College rose 16% between 2016 and 2019 ($10.1k → $11.7k).

flags.label: 3-year cohort default rate
flags.summary: 3-year cohort default rate at Beaufort County Community College fell 100% between 2021 and 2024 (7.8% → 0.0%).

flags.label: 150%-time completion
flags.summary: 150%-time completion at Beaufort County Community College rose 35% between 2006 and 2009 (24.1% → 32.5%).
